ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "payment_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment mode used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Total amount of transactions */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quarter in which the transactions occurred */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year in which the transactions occurred */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the transactions occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the transaction */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the merchant involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_mode_id") REFERENCES payment_modes ("payment_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_modes" (
  "payment_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment mode */,
  "payment_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment mode (e.g., Recharge & bill payments, Peer-to-peer payments) */,
  "payment_mode_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., Andaman & Nicobar Islands, Maharashtra) */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction log */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the individual transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the transaction */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the merchant involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., finance, IT) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quarter */,
  "payment_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment mode */,
  "average_transaction_amount" REAL /* Calculated average transaction amount */,
  "transaction_volume_growth" REAL /* Calculated growth in transaction volume */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment based on transaction behavior */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_analytics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_analytics_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_analytics_payment_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_mode_id") REFERENCES payment_modes ("payment_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_analytics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quarter */,
  "payment_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment mode */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of predictive model (e.g., linear regression, time series) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the predictive model */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model's details */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_models_payment_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_mode_id") REFERENCES payment_modes ("payment_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_models_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_models_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_models_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
